propositions: Add an optional Streamable-HTTP transport to rebar-mcp selected by config, keeping stdio as the unchanged default.

Extend McpConfig with transport, http_host, http_port, http_path, http_allowed_hosts, and http_allowed_origins, wired through the _SECTIONS['mcp'] coercer pipeline and registered in MCP_ENV_VARS and server.json.
Enable secure defaults: DNS-rebinding/Origin protection on, loopback-only bind, and refuse to start on a non-loopback host unless both allowlists are non-empty (fail-closed).
Add allow_unauthenticated_http guard so transport=http with no auth refuses to start unless the explicit acknowledgement is set.
Ship only the transport, transport-security, and unauthenticated-HTTP refusal; no token verifiers or token validation (deferred to later stories).
